/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/pointcloud_classifier__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/pointcloud_classifier/msg/detail/cluster_result_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/polinaus/pointcloud_classifier/build/pointcloud_classifier:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libpointcloud_classifier__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
